arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs Crystal Palace live on MNF: Wharton available
arts.sum: Adam Wharton is available for Monday's clash with Nottingham Forest but Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner has revealed he might need surgery at some point. Referencing the groin injury, Glasner added: "It doesn't look like it will disappear and we are looking for the right break.
